action_items.context: To prevent electric shut-off due next Thursday.

action_items.task: Contact PO for help with LIHEAP forms if needed
action_items.context: PO offered assistance to ensure utility assistance application is completed.

action_items.context: Required before starting classes at Tri-State Trucking Academy.

critical_updates.details: Client continues to work 35 hours a week at the Co-op.
WIOA approved tuition funding. Client is officially starting evening classes at Tri-State Trucking Academy on the 28th.
Client received an electric shut-off notice for $280 due next Thursday. Applying for LIHEAP assistance.
Health remains stable. Blood pressure is 125/80. Client is taking Lisinopril every morning and needs a DOT physical for school.
No police contact or new tickets reported.
No issues with drugs or alcohol reported.

next_episode_context: Client is maintaining stable employment at the Co-op (35 hrs/wk) and was approved for WIOA funding to start classes at Tri-State Trucking Academy on the 28th. Currently dealing with financial strain, specifically a $280 electric shut-off notice, and is applying for LIHEAP. Health is stable on Lisinopril, and there are no legal or substance use issues. Needs to complete a DOT physical prior to starting school.
